title: AI is meant to slash tech costs. So why are they rising?
description: Expenditure inflation at ASX Limited is a common theme across the Australian market and the world, even as the artificial intelligence investment boom heats up.
content:
It’s no great surprise that shares in ASX Limited plunged as much as 13 per cent on Tuesday, after the market operator told investors that the cost of its great technology turnaround had ballooned.

content:

title: ​How TSMC and AI mania helped Taiwan leapfrog India in global equity rankings
description: Taiwan has emerged as the world’s fifth-largest stock market, overtaking India amid a massive rally in semiconductor stocks. The rise has been powered largely by Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC), which has become one of the biggest beneficiaries of the global artificial intelligence boom. (Sources: CNBC, Bloomberg, Yahoo Finance) TSMC’s AI-fuelled rally reshapes global equity rankings

title: India: The New Growth Engine in Asia-Pac's AI and Energy Landscape
description: India is positioned as a crucial growth driver in the Asia Pacific region, leveraging advancements in artificial intelligence, a burgeoning young workforce, and a sharpened focus on energy security and sustainability.
